answers.where: bright open pasture with color pens, critters, HUD, and lure
answers.action: drag the lure to herd the red critters into the matching red pen
answers.response: the lure glow moves, critters follow, and matching pens/gates show the target color
answers.reward: captured critters pop with sparkles, score and remaining pips update, and waves lead to upgrades
answers.game_look: squishy critters, toy-fence pens, textured grass, glow FX, readable HUD, not debug primitives
